---
title: "AFLM Model Performance"
description: "Historical tipping performance of the plusSixOne ELO model, sourced from Squiggle."
execute:
  freeze: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r load, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)

# ── Squiggle API ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
squiggle_tips <- function(year) {
  url <- paste0(
    "https://api.squiggle.com.au/?q=tips;source=7;complete=100;year=", year
  )
  resp <- tryCatch(
    jsonlite::fromJSON(url, flatten = TRUE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(resp) || length(resp$tips) == 0) return(NULL)
  as_tibble(resp$tips)
}

current_year <- as.integer(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"))
years        <- 2018:current_year

raw <- map(years, squiggle_tips) %>%
  compact() %>%
  bind_rows()

# ── Tidy up ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tips <- raw %>%
  mutate(
    year    = as.integer(year),
    round   = as.integer(round),
    correct = as.integer(correct),
    err     = as.numeric(err),
    bits    = as.numeric(bits)
  ) %>%
  select(year, round, gameid, hteam, ateam, correct, err, bits)

# ── Season-level summary ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
season_summary <- tips %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    games         = n(),
    tips_correct  = sum(correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    tip_pct       = tips_correct / games,
    mae           = mean(err, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_bits    = sum(bits, na.rm = TRUE),
    bits_per_game = mean(bits, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Round-level summary ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
round_summary <- tips %>%
  group_by(year, round) %>%
  summarise(
    games        = n(),
    tips_correct = sum(correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    tip_pct      = tips_correct / games,
    mae          = mean(err, na.rm = TRUE),
    bits         = sum(bits, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r kpi, include=FALSE}
# ── Colour helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_color_pal <- function(colors, bias = 1) {
  get_color <- colorRamp(colors, bias = bias)
  function(x) rgb(get_color(x), maxColorValue = 255)
}

pct_color  <- make_color_pal(c("#ff2700", "#f8fcf8", "#44ab43"), bias = 1.3)
mae_color  <- make_color_pal(c("#44ab43", "#f8fcf8", "#ff2700"), bias = 1)
bits_color <- make_color_pal(c("#ff2700", "#f8fcf8", "#44ab43"), bias = 1.3)

colour_cell <- function(value, pal, range_vals, fmt_fn = identity) {
  if (is.na(value)) return("\u2013")
  rng    <- max(range_vals, na.rm = TRUE) - min(range_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  scaled <- if (rng == 0) 0.5 else (value - min(range_vals, na.rm = TRUE)) / rng
  scaled <- max(0, min(1, scaled))
  div(
    style = list(
      background   = pal(scaled),
      borderRadius = "4px",
      padding      = "2px 6px",
      display      = "inline-block",
      minWidth     = "52px",
      textAlign    = "center"
    ),
    fmt_fn(value)
  )
}

# ── All-time KPIs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
all_correct <- sum(season_summary$tips_correct)
all_games   <- sum(season_summary$games)
all_pct     <- all_correct / all_games
all_mae     <- mean(tips$err, na.rm = TRUE) %>% round(1)
all_bits    <- sum(season_summary$total_bits) %>% round(1)

card <- function(value, label, sub = NULL) {
  div(
    class = "kpi-card",
    div(class = "kpi-value", value),
    div(class = "kpi-label", label),
    if (!is.null(sub)) div(class = "kpi-sub", sub)
  )
}
```

```{r kpi_display, echo=FALSE}
div(
  class = "kpi-strip",
  card(
    paste0(all_correct, " / ", all_games),
    "Tips Correct (all time)",
    paste0(round(all_pct * 100, 1), "%")
  ),
  card(
    all_mae,
    "Avg Margin Error (pts)",
    "Mean absolute error"
  ),
  card(
    all_bits,
    "Total Bits (all time)",
    "Squiggle log\u2082 score"
  )
)
```

```{r season_table, echo=FALSE}
season_tbl <- reactable(
  season_summary %>%
    select(year, games, tips_correct, tip_pct, mae, bits_per_game, total_bits),
  pagination    = FALSE,
  width         = "100%",
  defaultSorted = list(year = "desc"),
  borderless    = TRUE,
  class         = "standings-table",
  defaultColDef = colDef(class = "cell", headerClass = "header"),
  columns = list(
    year = colDef(
      name     = "Season",
      maxWidth = 80,
      align    = "center",
      cell     = function(value) div(style = "font-weight:700", value)
    ),
    games = colDef(name = "Games", maxWidth = 70, align = "center"),
    tips_correct = colDef(
      name     = "Tips Correct",
      maxWidth = 110,
      align    = "center",
      cell     = function(value, index) {
        div(paste0(value, " / ", season_summary$games[index]))
      }
    ),
    tip_pct = colDef(
      name     = "Tip %",
      maxWidth = 90,
      align    = "center",
      cell     = function(value) {
        colour_cell(value, pct_color, season_summary$tip_pct,
                    function(v) paste0(round(v * 100, 1), "%"))
      }
    ),
    mae = colDef(
      name  = "Avg Margin Error",
      align = "center",
      cell  = function(value) {
        colour_cell(value, mae_color, season_summary$mae,
                    function(v) round(v, 1))
      }
    ),
    bits_per_game = colDef(
      name  = "Bits / Game",
      align = "center",
      cell  = function(value) {
        colour_cell(value, bits_color, season_summary$bits_per_game,
                    function(v) round(v, 3))
      }
    ),
    total_bits = colDef(
      name  = "Total Bits",
      align = "center",
      cell  = function(value) {
        colour_cell(value, bits_color, season_summary$total_bits,
                    function(v) round(v, 1))
      }
    )
  )
)

div(class = "standings", h3("Season Summary"), season_tbl)
```

```{r round_table, echo=FALSE}
available_years <- sort(unique(round_summary$year), decreasing = TRUE)
default_yr      <- available_years[1]

year_options <- tagList(lapply(available_years, function(y) {
  tags$option(
    value    = paste0("year-", y),
    selected = if (y == default_yr) "selected" else NULL,
    as.character(y)
  )
}))

round_tables <- tagList(lapply(available_years, function(y) {
  rd <- round_summary %>%
    filter(year == y) %>%
    select(round, games, tips_correct, tip_pct, mae, bits) %>%
    arrange(round)

  tbl <- reactable(
    rd,
    pagination    = FALSE,
    width         = "100%",
    borderless    = TRUE,
    class         = "standings-table",
    defaultColDef = colDef(class = "cell", headerClass = "header"),
    columns = list(
      round = colDef(
        name     = "Round",
        maxWidth = 70,
        align    = "center",
        cell     = function(value) div(style = "font-weight:700", value)
      ),
      games        = colDef(name = "Games", maxWidth = 70, align = "center"),
      tips_correct = colDef(
        name     = "Tips Correct",
        maxWidth = 120,
        align    = "center",
        cell     = function(value, index) {
          div(paste0(value, " / ", rd$games[index]))
        }
      ),
      tip_pct = colDef(
        name     = "Tip %",
        maxWidth = 90,
        align    = "center",
        cell     = function(value) {
          colour_cell(value, pct_color, rd$tip_pct,
                      function(v) paste0(round(v * 100, 1), "%"))
        }
      ),
      mae = colDef(
        name  = "Avg Margin Error",
        align = "center",
        cell  = function(value) {
          colour_cell(value, mae_color, rd$mae,
                      function(v) round(v, 1))
        }
      ),
      bits = colDef(
        name  = "Bits",
        align = "center",
        cell  = function(value) {
          colour_cell(value, bits_color, rd$bits,
                      function(v) round(v, 3))
        }
      )
    )
  )

  tags$div(
    id    = paste0("year-", y),
    class = "year-table",
    style = if (y == default_yr) "display:block" else "display:none",
    tbl
  )
}))

div(
  class = "standings",
  div(
    style = "display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px; margin:20px 0 12px;",
    h3(style = "margin:0", "Round by Round"),
    tags$select(
      id    = "year-selector",
      style = "font-family:Karla,sans-serif; font-size:14px; padding:4px 8px;
               border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;",
      year_options
    )
  ),
  round_tables
)
```

```{r fonts, echo=FALSE}
tags$link(
  href = "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Karla:400,700|Fira+Mono&display=fallback",
  rel  = "stylesheet"
)
```

```{js, echo=FALSE}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('year-selector');
  if (!sel) return;
  function showYear(id) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.year-table').forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
    const t = document.getElementById(id);
    if (t) t.style.display = 'block';
  }
  showYear(sel.value);
  sel.addEventListener('change', function() { showYear(this.value); });
});
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.kpi-strip {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 16px 0 28px;
}
.kpi-card {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 160px;
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 16px 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
}
.kpi-value {
  font-family: "Fira Mono", Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
}
.kpi-label {
  font-family: Karla, sans-serif;
  font-size: 13px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
  color: #666;
  margin-top: 4px;
}
.kpi-sub {
  font-family: "Fira Mono", monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #44ab43;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.standings {
  font-family: Karla, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 14px;
}
.standings-table { margin-bottom: 20px; }
.header {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  border-bottom-color: #555;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.header:hover,
.header[aria-sort="ascending"],
.header[aria-sort="descending"] { background-color: #eee; }
.cell { box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.15); }
.number {
  font-family: "Fira Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 30px;
  white-space: pre;
}
.container[role="main"],
.container {
  min-width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  width: 100%;
}
```
